posts.author: sivaprakashh
posts.community: Safe Enterprises Retail Fixtures Limited: Positioning at the Intersection of India’s Retail Growth Story
posts.text: Q4FY26 Concall Notes: Refurbishment is 25% of sales (3–4-year cycle). Q3FY27 Ambernath plant will be commencing operations. New product: WAVE – RFID based self-checkout system (can be bundled with fixtures, better integration). Mgmt. expects 25% PAT margin on a long-term basis, despite short-term uptake from transportation expense & lease reducing once Ambernath plant commences (by consolidating 5 existing plants). With existing capacity, they can do 30% growth in topline in FY27. If we include Ambernath, they can do 500 Cr without any additional machinery. 75 Cr for Plant + 15 Cr for Machiner…

posts.author: sivaprakashh
posts.community: Safe Enterprises Retail Fixtures Limited: Positioning at the Intersection of India’s Retail Growth Story
posts.text: https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/SAFEENTERPRISES_18052026224018_Outcome.pdf SERFL posted H2FY26 sales at 106 Cr (32% YoY, -6% HoH) & 32 Cr PAT (42% YoY, 30% margin). Closed FY26 with decent numbers, delivering 58% sales growth and 29% PAT margin. The number of store additions stalled at 425 (-5% YoY), but interestingly they increased their realization per store by 65%. This was driven by higher intensity of fixture per store, larger store format and rich product mix (doing cash counter, trail rooms). image 658×151 14.9 KB Also if we look at Zudio & Westside store addition, Zudio has…
